text: What is the EU AI Act risk classification for this system (unacceptable, high-risk, limited, minimal)?
aiAgentGuidance: Classify risk level based on Annex III categories and system functionality.

text: Does this system fall under any Annex III high-risk AI category?
aiAgentGuidance: Check against all 8 Annex III domains and sub-categories.

text: What conformity assessment procedure is required?
aiAgentGuidance: Determine assessment type based on risk classification and domain.

text: What technical documentation is required under EU AI Act Article 11?
aiAgentGuidance: Generate documentation checklist from Article 11 requirements.

text: What quality management system requirements apply (Article 17)?
aiAgentGuidance: Map QMS requirements from Article 17 to current processes.

text: What transparency obligations apply (Article 13, Article 52)?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify transparency requirements based on system type and user interaction.

text: What human oversight requirements apply (Article 14)?
aiAgentGuidance: Map human oversight measures from Article 14 to system design.

text: What record-keeping and logging requirements apply (Article 12)?
aiAgentGuidance: Generate logging requirements checklist from Article 12.

text: What post-market monitoring obligations apply (Article 61)?
aiAgentGuidance: Design post-market monitoring plan per Article 61 requirements.

text: Is registration in the EU AI database required (Article 60)?
aiAgentGuidance: Determine registration requirements based on system classification.

text: What GDPR lawful basis applies for personal data processing?
aiAgentGuidance: Assess lawful basis options based on data processing activities.

text: Has a Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA) been conducted?
aiAgentGuidance: Guide through DPIA framework and flag high-risk processing activities.

text: What data subject rights must be supported (access, rectification, erasure, portability)?
aiAgentGuidance: Map applicable data subject rights from GDPR and local regulations.

text: What cross-border data transfer mechanisms are needed (SCCs, BCRs, adequacy)?
aiAgentGuidance: Assess transfer mechanisms based on data flows and jurisdictions.

text: Is a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) required with third-party providers?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify DPA needs based on data sharing arrangements.

text: What data retention periods apply to AI training data and inference logs?
aiAgentGuidance: Determine retention periods from regulatory requirements and data categories.

text: How will the right to explanation for automated decisions be implemented (GDPR Art. 22)?
aiAgentGuidance: Design explanation mechanism meeting Art. 22 requirements.

text: What privacy-by-design measures are incorporated?
aiAgentGuidance: Apply privacy-by-design checklist to system architecture.

text: Is a legitimate interest assessment (LIA) required?
aiAgentGuidance: Conduct preliminary LIA based on processing purposes and data sensitivity.

text: What children's data protection requirements apply (if any)?
aiAgentGuidance: Assess applicability of children's data protection regulations.

text: What industry-specific regulations apply (financial services, healthcare, education)?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify sector-specific AI regulations from industry classification.

text: Are there professional licensing or certification requirements for AI in this domain?
aiAgentGuidance: Research domain-specific certification requirements.

text: What consumer protection laws apply to AI-powered products/services?
aiAgentGuidance: Map applicable consumer protection regulations.

text: Are there anti-discrimination laws that constrain AI decision-making?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify anti-discrimination laws relevant to the use case domain.

text: What employment law implications exist if AI is used in HR/workforce decisions?
aiAgentGuidance: Assess employment law requirements for AI-assisted workforce decisions.

text: What accessibility regulations apply (ADA, EAA)?
aiAgentGuidance: Map accessibility requirements from applicable regulations.

text: What IP rights apply to AI model outputs?
aiAgentGuidance: Analyze IP ownership framework for AI-generated content.

text: Are there copyright concerns with AI training data?
aiAgentGuidance: Assess training data copyright compliance and fair use considerations.

text: What model licensing terms and restrictions apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Review licensing terms for all AI models and components used.

text: How will open-source AI component licensing be managed?
aiAgentGuidance: Audit open-source dependencies and licensing compatibility.

text: What trade secret protection measures are needed for proprietary AI components?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend trade secret protection for custom models and training data.

text: Are there patent considerations for the AI approach or algorithms used?
aiAgentGuidance: Conduct preliminary patent landscape analysis for the AI techniques used.

text: What liability allocation framework and product liability considerations apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Requires legal analysis of liability allocation.

text: What product liability regulations apply to AI-powered products?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify applicable product liability frameworks (EU Product Liability Directive).

text: Is AI-specific insurance needed (errors & omissions, cyber, product liability)?
aiAgentGuidance: Assess insurance needs based on risk profile and liability exposure.

text: What contractual liability limitations should be included in agreements?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose liability clauses for AI-related contracts.

text: How will liability be apportioned in multi-vendor AI supply chains?
aiAgentGuidance: Requires legal analysis of supply chain liability allocation.

text: What AI-specific clauses are needed in vendor contracts?
aiAgentGuidance: Generate AI contract clause checklist (data usage, model ownership, SLAs).

text: What SLA commitments are required from AI service providers?
aiAgentGuidance: Define SLA requirements based on criticality and usage patterns.

text: What data ownership and processing terms govern vendor relationships?
aiAgentGuidance: Review data terms in vendor agreements against requirements.

text: What exit clauses and data portability terms are needed?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose vendor lock-in mitigation clauses and data portability terms.

text: What indemnification terms are needed for AI-related risks?
aiAgentGuidance: Draft indemnification language for AI-specific risk scenarios.

text: In which jurisdictions will this AI system operate?
aiAgentGuidance: Map deployment jurisdictions from business requirements.

text: What jurisdiction-specific AI regulations apply (US state laws, China AI regulations, etc.)?
aiAgentGuidance: Research AI regulations for each deployment jurisdiction.

text: How will conflicting regulations across jurisdictions be managed?
aiAgentGuidance: Requires legal analysis of regulatory conflict resolution.

text: What export control regulations apply to AI technology?
aiAgentGuidance: Check AI components against export control lists and restrictions.

text: What sanctions or trade restrictions affect AI vendor selection?
aiAgentGuidance: Screen vendors and technologies against sanctions lists.

text: What internal compliance policies govern AI deployment?
aiAgentGuidance: Map to organization's AI policy framework.

text: What compliance monitoring and reporting requirements exist?
aiAgentGuidance: Generate compliance monitoring checklist from applicable regulations.

text: What audit trail and evidence requirements apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Define audit trail requirements from regulatory and internal policy frameworks.

text: What compliance training is required for team members?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify mandatory training from regulatory requirements and role responsibilities.

text: What third-party compliance certifications are required or recommended?
aiAgentGuidance: Map required certifications from regulatory and customer requirements.

text: How will regulatory changes be tracked and responded to?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose regulatory change monitoring and impact assessment process.

text: What risk classification does this system receive under internal frameworks?
aiAgentGuidance: Classify using internal risk framework based on impact and likelihood.

text: What is the potential harm severity if the AI system fails?
aiAgentGuidance: Assess harm severity across dimensions (financial, physical, psychological, reputational).

text: What vulnerable populations could be affected by this system?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify vulnerable populations from use case context and deployment domain.

text: What fundamental rights impact assessment has been conducted?
aiAgentGuidance: Guide through fundamental rights impact assessment framework.

text: What risk mitigation measures are in place or planned?
aiAgentGuidance: Generate risk mitigation plan from identified risks and best practices.

text: What regulatory filings and ongoing compliance reporting requirements exist?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify required filings from applicable regulations and jurisdiction.

text: What ongoing reporting obligations exist (incident reporting, periodic reviews)?
aiAgentGuidance: Map reporting obligations from regulatory requirements.

text: What documentation must be maintained for regulatory inspection?
aiAgentGuidance: Generate documentation requirements list from applicable regulations.

text: How will regulatory inquiries and audits be supported?
aiAgentGuidance: Design audit response process and documentation repository.

text: What model cards or system documentation standards apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Apply model card framework and documentation standards.

text: What anticipated regulatory changes and adaptability measures are planned?
aiAgentGuidance: Research pending AI legislation in relevant jurisdictions.

text: How will the system adapt to evolving regulatory requirements?
aiAgentGuidance: Design regulatory adaptability into system architecture.

text: What industry standards and best practices should be followed proactively?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify relevant industry standards (ISO, IEEE, NIST) for AI systems.

text: What regulatory sandbox or testing opportunities are available?
aiAgentGuidance: Research available regulatory sandboxes in relevant jurisdictions.
